INTAKE_RECEIVED.description: Job received from client, not yet allocated

ALLOCATED.description: Job assigned to designer, not yet started

ON_HOLD.description: Job paused — stores previous state for resume

CLIENT_RETURN.description: Job returned by client for revision

QC_REVIEW.description: Job submitted to QC for review

COMPLETED_BILLABLE.description: Job completed and ready for billing

INVOICED.description: Job billed to client — terminal, immutable

business_rules.ON_HOLD: Stores previous state in prev_state field for correct resume routing
business_rules.INVOICED: Terminal and immutable — no transitions allowed after INVOICED
business_rules.QC_REVIEW: Requires QC checklist submission — rework increments rework_cycle
